[Inbreeding and kinship](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_inbreeding_and_kinship ": Analyze the pedigree without genomic data")

[Matings](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_assignment_of_optimal_breeding_pairs ": Assignment of optimal breeding pairs")

[Overall FST](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_average_fst ": Estimate the relative fixation index between two populations")
[PCA](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_pca ": Principal Components Analysis of genotype data")
[Pairs sequenced](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_offspring_heterozygosity ": Offspring estimated heterozygosity of sequenced pairs")
[Pathway Image](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_pathway_image ": Draw a KEGG pathway, highlighting specified gene modules")
[Per-SNP FSTs](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_add_fst_column ": Compute a fixation index score for each SNP")
[Phylip](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_make_phylip ": prepare data for phylogenetic analysis")
[Phylogenetic Tree](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_phylogenetic_tree ": Show genetic relationships among individuals")
[Phyogenetic reconstruction with RAxML](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=raxml "- Maximum Likelihood based inference of large phylogenetic trees")
[Pick Primers](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_extract_primers ": Find suitable PCR primers for SNPs")
[Population Complexity](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_evaluate_population_numbers ": Evaluate possible numbers of ancestral populations")
[Prepare Input](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_prepare_population_structure ": Filter and convert to the format needed for these tools")
[RAxML](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_raxml ": construct a maximum-likelihood phylogenetic tree")
[Rank Pathways](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_calc_freq ": Assess the impact of a gene set on KEGG pathways")
[Rank Terms](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_rank_terms ": Assess the enrichment/depletion of a gene set for GO terms")
[Remarkable Intervals](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_find_intervals ": Find high-scoring runs of SNPs")
[Reorder individuals](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_reorder ": exchange rows in the above picture")
[Restore Attributes](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_restore_attributes ": Fill in missing properties for a gd_snp or gd_genotype dataset")
[Sample SNPs](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_select_snps ": Select a specified number of SNPs, uniformly spaced")
[Specify Individuals](https://usegalaxy.eu/root?tool_id=gd_specify ": Define a collection of individuals from a gd_snp dataset")
